title: AIS Framework Adoption Tracker
description: JSON Schema 2020-12 for tracking which AIS Agentic Engineering Framework components a team has adopted in their repository. Produced by the gap-analyzer skill and the brownfield-assessor-agent. Used to calculate adoption percentages shown in the governance explorer.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this adoption report was generated.

overall_percentage.description: Overall framework adoption percentage across all categories.

categories.description: Per-category adoption data. Each key is a category name.

agents.description: Agent definition YAML files in framework/agents/.

skills.description: Skill definition YAML files in framework/skills/.

tests.description: Framework test coverage and test evidence artifacts.

AdoptionCategory.description: Adoption data for a single framework component category.

total.description: Total number of trackable items in this category.

adopted.description: Number of items in this category that have been adopted.

name.description: Human-readable name of this framework component item.

adopted.description: True if this item has been adopted in the repository.

path.description: Relative path to the adopted artifact in the repository. Null if not yet adopted.

notes.description: Optional notes about adoption status, blockers, or partial adoption details.
